name: review-it
description: The QA front door of the DevOtts lifecycle family — plan-it plans, fable-it builds, review-it verifies. Primary mission: run the unit tests, e2e tests, and test-cases generated at plan phase to validate that what fable-it built obeys the plan. Four modes (contract-qa PRIMARY, side-effects, deploy-verify, pr-review) route execution to existing specialists (full-qa, iterate, chrome-cdp-control, make-eval, parallel-lifecycle) and enforce an 11-rule gate catalog that makes false-VERIFIED claims un-shippable: third-party writes read back from the target's own API and UI, interactive controls operated not just rendered, read-back stability, narration never accepted as evidence, deployed-code ladder over status proxies, and oracle provenance (AUTHORED vs DERIVED — no self-graded green). Emits one evidence-backed report format shared with fable-it.
